dividend_yield.model_impact: The factor was retained as a documented gap only; it provides no usable signal in the cached training panel and should not affect current cross-sectional ranking.
recommended_fix: Backfill PIT dividend-per-share history from Polygon/FMP corporate-actions or fundamentals endpoints.
Persist annual_dividend and dividend_per_share consistently in fundamentals_pit before feature generation.
Add a regression test covering non-null dividend_yield generation for a known dividend payer.

eps_surprise.model_impact: The factor was retained as a documented gap only; consensus-EPS coverage is absent in the cached panel, so the feature contributes nothing to model training.
recommended_fix: Backfill PIT consensus EPS alongside reported EPS in fundamentals_pit.
Normalize consensus metric aliases before feature computation so eps_consensus and consensus_eps collapse into one path.
Add a regression test covering non-null eps_surprise generation for a ticker with known analyst-consensus data.
